title: Cross-Encoder, Late-Interaction, Diversity, and Reranking · Language Clinic: Rag Late Interaction Colbert
summary: A cross-encoder scores the whole corpus online, reranks only five dense candidates, ignores latency and diversity, and is declared better from one question. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the late interaction colbert increment in budgeted retrieve-and-rerank pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Explain token-level late interaction, index cost, maximum similarity, query/document encoding, and when it earns complexity.
Apply a query-document cross-encoder with batching, truncation, calibration, model-card limits, and target relevance evaluation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: rag-late-interaction-colbert — Explain token-level late interaction, index cost, maximum similarity, query/document encoding, and when it earns complexity.
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-reranking-3
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-reranking-3.
# Case 5798: a multimodal maintenance-manual release.
# Operating constraint: retain corpus, document, chunk, model, index, prompt, query, and evaluation version identity.
# Changed case: move the only supporting passage to the middle of the context and rerun the position slice.
def worked_rag_reranking_3(candidate_count: int = 40, rerank_count: int = 12, accepted_count: int = 5, cross_encoder_ms: float = 36.0, late_interaction: bool = False, evaluated: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "corpusworked3",
        "query3dekrow",
        "tenant5798",
        "indexworked35798",
        "prompt3dekrow5798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if candidate_count <= 0 or rerank_count <= 0:
        return False, 0, "candidate-budget"
    if rerank_count > candidate_count or accepted_count > rerank_count:
        return False, accepted_count, "rerank-shape"
    if cross_encoder_ms <= 0.0:
        return False, accepted_count, "latency-evidence"
    if late_interaction and rerank_count < accepted_count:
        return False, accepted_count, "late-interaction-state"
    if not evaluated:
        return False, accepted_count, "quality-gate"
    assert 0 < accepted_count <= rerank_count
    return True, accepted_count, "reranked-context"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-late-interaction-colbert-1rgk45
# Competency: rag-late-interaction-colbert.
# Case 8511: an enterprise retrieval migration canary.
# Operating constraint: keep every status keyboard reachable, announced, readable without color, and linked to structured source evidence.
# Changed case: insert an untrusted instruction into a relevant document and prove it remains data.
def evidence_rag_late_interaction_colbert_1rgk45(candidate_count: int = 40, rerank_count: int = 12, accepted_count: int = 5, cross_encoder_ms: float = 36.0, late_interaction: bool = False, evaluated: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1rgk45 = "1rgk45-54kgr1-8511"
    assert evidence_variant_1rgk45
    evidence_axes_1rgk45 = (
        "corpus1rgk45",
        "query54kgr1",
        "tenant8511",
        "index1rgk458511",
        "prompt54kgr18511",
        "evaluation85111rgk45",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1rgk45)) == 6
    if candidate_count <= 0 or rerank_count <= 0:
        return False, 0, "candidate-budget"
    if rerank_count > candidate_count or accepted_count > rerank_count:
        return False, accepted_count, "rerank-shape"
    if cross_encoder_ms <= 0.0:
        return False, accepted_count, "latency-evidence"
    if late_interaction and rerank_count < accepted_count:
        return False, accepted_count, "late-interaction-state"
    if not evaluated:
        return False, accepted_count, "quality-gate"
    assert 0 < accepted_count <= rerank_count
    return True, accepted_count, "reranked-context"
